title: Revise dry4ts plan to structural-first parallel TDD
description: Update the dry4ts design plan after review: narrow v1, remove junk/overbuilt Type-4 and literal-evaluator scope from v1, make Module seams deeper, make Beads dependencies concrete for parallel agents, split setup from behavior TDD, and add integration handoff mechanics.
close_reason: Updated dry4ts plan to structural-first v1 with concrete Beads dependency graph, parallel subagent integration protocol, explicit vertical TDD child beads, smaller deep Module architecture, and post-v1 Svelte/Type-4 follow-up templates.

title: Clean up stale dry4ts setup wording
description: Remove stale package skeleton wording left after splitting dry4ts package setup from the CLI behavior bead.
close_reason: Removed stale package skeleton wording from the dry4ts Bead testing contract.

title: Revise dry4ts plan for parallel TDD agents
description: Update docs/plans/2026-05-27-dry4ts-design.md to apply the review findings: make beads tracer-bullet shaped, add explicit bd dependencies and subagent/worktree protocol, add deeper architecture guidance including Type4CloneDetector and module index, and split broad implementation beads into smaller behavior slices.
close_reason: Updated dry4ts plan with Module index, Type4CloneDetector, parallel subagent protocol, explicit Beads dependency shape, and single-behavior TDD bead hierarchy.

title: Revise dry4ts design plan for Beads/TDD execution
description: Update docs/plans/2026-05-27-dry4ts-design.md to resolve execution risks: active Beads workflow, split-ready packages/dry4ts placement, vertical TDD tracer-bullet structure, safer Type-4 architecture, deeper module seams, and removal of time/day estimates.
design: Documentation-only plan update. No production code changes.
acceptance_criteria: Plan names Beads execution flow, uses packages/dry4ts split-ready layout, removes day/time estimates, addresses Type-4 safety and signature bucketing, and structures implementation as TDD tracer bullets.
close_reason: Patched missed performance-gate inconsistency: conduit pilot now measures runtime/memory and files follow-up beads for candidate limiting or MinHash before any runtime gate.
